title: Halo: Combat Evolved
edition_pinned: Evidence from Halo: The Master Chief Collection Steam app 976730 listing (includes Halo: CE Anniversary), observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 2001 Halo: Combat Evolved design.
moat: Two-weapon carry and regenerating shields turn encounter geometry and weapon pickups into paced arena decisions.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: Shared sandbox encounters serve campaign missions and multiplayer without separate progression ladders.
exemplar_rationale: Defines console FPS readability where arena design and limited inventory carry execution depth.

evidence.claim: Steam reported 260174 all-language, all-purchase user reviews for Halo: The Master Chief Collection.
Steam appdetails genres field listed: Action.
